evals.prompt: Improve this prompt only: fix the flaky auth tests in this repo.
evals.expected_behavior: Returns a faithful repo-grounded brief with goal, scope, assumptions, deliverable, validation, and next phase without starting implementation.
assertions: Does not silently execute when prompt-only intent is explicit
Includes validation and recommended next phase

evals.prompt: Sharpen this prompt, then use the improved brief to move into planning: add a new skill for cache debugging.
evals.expected_behavior: First rewrites the request, then proceeds only into the requested next phase.
assertions: Hands off to planning rather than immediate coding if planning was requested
